message:
🐛 Fix 'Add more' button to open Console Studio instead of SidebarCustomizer (#9715)

The sidebar 'Add more...' button was opening the SidebarCustomizer dialog
instead of Console Studio at the Dashboards section. Now uses
openAddCardModal('dashboards') when the dashboard context is available,
with SidebarCustomizer as fallback for non-dashboard pages.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
